title: Worked Example - Access and Modify String

content.problemStatement:
In this example, we demonstrate how to use **index notation (`str[i]`)** in C to access and modify specific characters in a string.\
The program stores `"Technology"` in a string, accesses the first and fourth characters, and then modifies the last character to display a revised version of the word.

---

**When executed, the code will show:**

```default
First character: T
Fourth character: h
Modified last character: !
Modified word: Technolog!
```
